channel.title: CCNA on LovelyRua's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in CCNA on LovelyRua's Blog

item.title: Cisco IOS 速查表 - Switching and Routing Quick Reference
item.description:
这是一份偏 CCNA 语境的 Cisco IOS 速查表，覆盖基础管理、二层交换、三层交换、路由器、常见网络服务与排障检查命令。
约定：尖括号 <...> 表示需要替换的变量；命令以典型 IOS 语法为主，不同平台或版本可能略有差异。

基础模式与编辑 

1
2

enable
configure terminal

1
2

Ctrl+A 移动到行首
Ctrl+E 移动到行尾

1
2
3

show running-config | include <string>
default interface <interface-id>
do write

do 可在配置模式下执行 EXEC 命令，例如 do show ip interface brief。

安全管理基线 

1
2
3
4

hostname R1
enable secret <password>
service password-encryption
ip domain-name CCNA.local

1
2
3

username <username> privilege 15 secret <password>
ip ssh version 2
crypto key generate rsa modulus 2048

限制远程管理来源：

1
2
3
4
5
6
7

access-list 1 permit host <management-ip>

line vty 0 15
 login local
 exec-timeout 5 0
 transport input ssh
 access-class 1 in

Console 口基础保护：

1
2
3
4
5

line console 0
 password <password>
 login
 exec-timeout 5 0
 logging synchronous

检查：

1
2

show ssh
show running-config | include username|enable|transport|access-class

日志与时间戳 

1
2
3
4
5

logging console <severity>
logging monitor <severity>
logging buffered <size> <severity>
logging host <syslog-server-ip>
logging trap <severity>

1
2
3
4

service timestamps log datetime
service sequence-numbers
terminal monitor
logging synchronous

说明：

  • logging buffered：保存在本机内存中；
  • logging host + logging trap：发送到远程 Syslog；
  • terminal monitor：远程终端实时查看日志；
  • logging synchronous：避免日志打断正在输入的命令行。

SNMP 基础 

1
2
3
4
5

snmp-server contact <contact>
snmp-server location <location>
snmp-server community <community> ro
snmp-server host <ip-address> version 2c <community>
snmp-server enable traps

生产环境建议使用 SNMPv3；实验与 CCNA 语境中常见 v2c + community。

IOS 升级流程 

1
2
3

ip ftp username <username>
ip ftp password <password>
copy ftp: flash:

指定启动镜像：

1
2
3

boot system flash:<ios-image.bin>
write
reload

确认与清理：

1
2
3
4

show version
show file systems
show flash
delete flash:<old-ios-image.bin>

接入交换机基础配置

创建 VLAN：

1
2
3
4

vlan 10
 name ENGINEERING
vlan 11
 name VOICE

配置接入口：

1
2
3
4
5

interface range f0/1-12
 description -- Engineering Department Ports --
 switchport mode access
 switchport access vlan 10
 switchport voice vlan 11

禁用未使用端口：

1
2
3

interface range f0/25-48
 description -- Not in Use - Disabled --
 shutdown

配置上联 Trunk：

1
2
3
4
5
6

interface g0/1
 description -- Trunk to Upstream Device --
 switchport mode trunk
 switchport nonegotiate
 switchport trunk allowed vlan 10,20,30
 switchport trunk native vlan 1001

交换机管理地址：

1
2
3
4
5

interface vlan 1
 ip address 192.168.123.253 255.255.255.0
 no shutdown

ip default-gateway 192.168.123.1

检查：

1
2
3
4
5

show ip interface brief
show interfaces status
show vlan brief
show interfaces trunk
show interfaces <interface-id> switchport

STP：生成树基础 

1
2
3

spanning-tree mode rapid-pvst
spanning-tree portfast default
spanning-tree portfast bpduguard default

指定根桥：

1
2

spanning-tree vlan <vlan-id> root primary
spanning-tree vlan <vlan-id> root secondary

或手动指定优先级：

1

spanning-tree vlan <vlan-id> priority <priority>

检查：

1
2
3

show spanning-tree
show spanning-tree vlan <vlan-id>
show errdisable recovery

EtherChannel

配置 LACP：

1
2
3
4

port-channel load-balance src-dst-ip

interface range f0/1-4
 channel-group 1 mode active

配置聚合接口：

1
2
3
4

interface port-channel 1
 description -- Uplink EtherChannel --
 switchport mode trunk
 switchport trunk allowed vlan 10,20,30

检查：

1
2
3

show etherchannel summary
show etherchannel port-channel
show interfaces port-channel 1

端口安全 

1
2
3
4
5
6

interface f0/1
 switchport mode access
 switchport port-security
 switchport port-security maximum <number>
 switchport port-security mac-address sticky
 switchport port-security violation <shutdown|restrict|protect>

老化策略：

1
2

switchport port-security aging time <minutes>
switchport port-security aging type <absolute|inactivity>

Errdisable 自动恢复：

1
2

errdisable recovery cause psecure-violation
errdisable recovery interval <seconds>

检查：

1
2
3
4

show port-security
show port-security interface <interface-id>
show mac address-table secure
show errdisable recovery

DHCP Snooping 与 ARP Inspection

启用 DHCP Snooping：

1
2
3

ip dhcp snooping
ip dhcp snooping vlan <vlan-id>
no ip dhcp snooping information option

信任上联端口：

1
2

interface g0/1
 ip dhcp snooping trust

限制接入口速率：

1
2

interface f0/1
 ip dhcp snooping limit rate <packets-per-second>

启用 Dynamic ARP Inspection：

1
2

ip arp inspection vlan <vlan-id>
ip arp inspection validate src-mac dst-mac ip

信任上联：

1
2

interface g0/1
 ip arp inspection trust

静态 ARP ACL：

1
2
3
4

arp access-list <name>
 permit ip host <ip-address> mac host <mac-address>

ip arp inspection filter <name> vlan <vlan-id>

检查：

1
2
3
4

show ip dhcp snooping
show ip dhcp snooping binding
show ip arp inspection
show ip arp inspection interfaces

三层交换机

三层上联口：

1
2
3
4
5

interface g0/1
 description -- L3 Link to Upstream --
 no switchport
 ip address 10.0.0.253 255.255.255.252
 no shutdown

SVI 网关：

1
2
3
4
5
6
7

vlan 10
 name ENGINEERING

interface vlan 10
 description -- Gateway for Engineering VLAN --
 ip address 10.0.0.62 255.255.255.192
 no shutdown

开启三层转发与默认路由：

1
2

ip routing
ip route 0.0.0.0 0.0.0.0 10.0.0.254

检查：

1
2
3
4

show ip interface brief
show vlan brief
show interfaces trunk
show ip route

路由器接口与静态路由

接口地址：

1
2
3

interface g0/1
 ip address <ip-address> <subnet-mask>
 no shutdown

默认路由：

1

ip route 0.0.0.0 0.0.0.0 <next-hop-ip>

主机路由：

1

ip route 1.1.1.1 255.255.255.255 <next-hop-ip>

Router-on-a-stick：

1
2
3
4
5
6
7

interface g0/0.10
 encapsulation dot1q 10
 ip address 192.168.10.1 255.255.255.0

interface g0/0.99
 encapsulation dot1q 99 native
 ip address 192.168.99.1 255.255.255.0

OSPF 与动态路由

进程配置：

1
2
3
4

router ospf 1
 passive-interface <interface-id>
 network <network-address> <wildcard-mask> area 0
 auto-cost reference-bandwidth 100000

接口配置：

1
2

interface g0/0
 ip ospf 1 area 0

检查：

1
2
3
4

show ip protocols
show ip ospf neighbor
show ip ospf interface brief
show ip route ospf

FHRP：默认网关冗余

HSRP 示例：

1
2
3
4

interface g0/0
 standby 1 ip <virtual-ip>
 standby 1 priority 150
 standby 1 preempt

检查：

1
2

show standby
show standby brief

IPv6 基础

开启 IPv6 转发：

1

ipv6 unicast-routing

检查：

1
2

show ipv6 interface brief
show ipv6 route

ACL

标准 ACL：

1
2

access-list 1 permit <source-ip> <wildcard-mask>
access-list 1 deny any

命名 ACL：

1
2
3

ip access-list standard <name>
 permit <source-ip> <wildcard-mask>
 deny any

扩展 ACL：

1
2
3

ip access-list extended <name>
 permit tcp <source> <source-wildcard> <destination> <destination-wildcard> eq 443
 deny ip any any

应用到接口：

1
2

interface g0/1
 ip access-group <number|name> <in|out>

检查：

1
2

show access-lists
show ip interface <interface-id>

CDP / LLDP

全局启用：

1
2

cdp run
lldp run

接口启用 LLDP：

1
2
3

interface range g0/0-1
 lldp transmit
 lldp receive

检查：

1
2

show cdp neighbors detail
show lldp neighbors detail

NTP / DNS

NTP：

1
2
3
4

ntp server <ntp-server> key <key-number>
ntp peer <ip-address>
ntp update-calendar
ntp source <interface-id>

NTP 认证：

1
2

ntp authentication-key <key-number> md5 <key>
ntp trusted-key <key-number>

时区：

1
2

clock timezone CST 8
clock summer-time CDT recurring

DNS：

1
2
3

ip domain-lookup
ip name-server <server1> <server2>
ip host <hostname> <ip-address>

检查：

1
2
3

show ntp status
show ntp associations
show hosts

DHCP Server / Relay / Client

排除地址：

1

ip dhcp excluded-address 192.168.1.1 192.168.1.100

地址池：

1
2
3
4
5
6

ip dhcp pool <pool-name>
 network 192.168.1.0 255.255.255.0
 dns-server 8.8.8.8
 domain-name lovelyrua.asia
 default-router 192.168.1.1
 lease <days> <hours> <minutes>

DHCP Relay：

1
2

interface g0/1
 ip helper-address <dhcp-server-ip>

DHCP Client：

1
2

interface f0/1
 ip address dhcp

检查：

1
2
3

show ip dhcp binding
show ip dhcp pool
show ip dhcp server statistics

NAT / PAT

标记 inside / outside：

1
2
3
4
5

interface g0/1
 ip nat inside

interface g0/0
 ip nat outside

静态 NAT：

1

ip nat inside source static 192.168.0.1 100.0.0.1

动态 NAT：

1
2
3

access-list 1 permit 192.168.0.0 0.0.0.255
ip nat pool POOL1 100.0.0.10 100.0.0.20 netmask 255.255.255.0
ip nat inside source list 1 pool POOL1

PAT：

1
2

access-list 1 permit 192.168.0.0 0.0.0.255
ip nat inside source list 1 interface g0/0 overload

检查：

1
2

show ip nat translations
show ip nat statistics

QoS 基础 

1
2

class-map HTTP_MAP
 match protocol http

1
2
3
4
5
6

policy-map G0/0/0_OUT
 class HTTP_MAP
 set ip dscp af31
 priority percent 10
 class class-default
 bandwidth percent 90

应用：

1
2

interface g0/0/0
 service-policy output G0/0/0_OUT

GRE Tunnel 

1
2
3
4

interface tunnel 0
 ip address <tunnel-ip> <subnet-mask>
 tunnel source <outside-interface>
 tunnel destination <remote-public-ip>

检查：

1
2

show interfaces tunnel 0
show ip route

VRF 

1

ip vrf CUSTOMER1

1
2
3

interface g0/0
 ip vrf forwarding CUSTOMER1
 ip address 192.168.1.1 255.255.255.0

检查：

1
2

show ip vrf
show ip route vrf CUSTOMER1

常用排障命令索引

接口与 VLAN：

1
2
3
4

show ip interface brief
show interfaces status
show interfaces trunk
show vlan brief

二层安全：

1
2
3
4
5

show spanning-tree
show etherchannel summary
show port-security
show ip dhcp snooping binding
show ip arp inspection

路由与邻居：

1
2
3
4
5
6

show ip route
show ip protocols
show ip ospf neighbor
show standby brief
show cdp neighbors detail
show lldp neighbors detail

服务：

1
2
3
4

show ntp status
show hosts
show ip dhcp binding
show ip nat translations

终端侧快速检查：

1
2
3
4

ipconfig /all
ipconfig /displaydns
ipconfig /flushdns
ping <ip-address> -n 1
